data.title: Migrate merge-to-main.sh detection calls to shared library
data.description:
Replace detection-only calls: _abort_stale_rebase REBASE_HEAD check, _cleanup_stale_git_state MERGE_HEAD/REBASE_HEAD checks, --diff-filter=U conflict detection. Source via $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh (consistent with existing deps.sh sourcing). Orchestration logic (rebase loop, auto-resolve, file cleanup) remains untouched.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #1 — substitutive refactor. Only detection mechanism swapped.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] merge-to-main.sh sources merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] Detection calls use library functions
  Verify: grep -q 'ms_is_merge_in_progress\|ms_is_rebase_in_progress\|ms_get_conflicted_files' plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] Existing merge-to-main tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh
